title: Cobblemon Gui Black & White Edition
description: It is a resource pack that modifies Cobblemon's graphical user interface (GUI) texture to one inspired by Pokemon Black and White Edition.
body:
![LogoBW_@Vermout](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc77e89e85c53420d3254660fe02ec4ef1efd48d.png)
This resource pack is for the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod. It changes the original Gui textures of the mod to one inspired by Pokemon Black and White (Edition 1 and 2).
![separador_v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f12a125f4bad95fe6c25d623771eb5fc06d8ce13_0.webp)
### Summary Gui new desing - BW Edition:
![Summary Gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e4a604c4c7ec5bf7be172aeb9c549d5844175e9_0.webp)
![separador_v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f12a125f4bad95fe6c25d623771eb5fc06d8ce13_0.webp)
### Features(so far!): **Cobblemon** + Created to work with Minecraft 1.21.1 - Cobblemon 1.6+ + Party List (Completed) + Summary (Completed) + Pc Gui (Completed) + Type & Category Icons (Completed all icons of type) + Battle Gui (Completed) + Sounds(Music in battle) + Gui (Clicks) + Wild Battles + Battle Wild - Black and White Edition + Trainer & NPC Battles + Battle trainer Battle - Black and White Edition **Minecraft** + Sounds + Click + LevelUp
![separador_v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f12a125f4bad95fe6c25d623771eb5fc06d8ce13_0.webp)
### Planned Features - Cobblemon + Pokemon Interaction GUI + Starter Selection GUI + Trade Gui + Dialogue & Npc Gui + Pokenav Gui
![separador_v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f12a125f4bad95fe6c25d623771eb5fc06d8ce13_0.webp)
### Mod Support | Mod | Cobblemon Gui BW | | ----------- | ----------- | | [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) | >= 1.0 | | MoreCobblemonTweaks | >=1.2 | | Cobblemon RIze Tweaks | next update | | ---- | ---- | _**Nota:**_ Upgrade progress will depend on the support shown.
![separador_v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f12a125f4bad95fe6c25d623771eb5fc06d8ce13_0.webp)
### More If you find bugs don't hesitate to tell me about them, including suggestions, ideas or support for specific mods!

👆 You need to be in the Official Cobblemon Discord Server🔹.
